description: An applicant received an email that their application is incomplete and wants to know what is missing.

nodes.task_description: Check the application checklist in the SIS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the 'Official High School Transcript' is marked as not received.

nodes.task_description: Inform the applicant which document is missing and explain how to submit it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the missing item and submission instructions.
